arts.sum: Liverpool are preparing to refresh Arne Slot’s squad in the summer and are open to offloading as many as five players. Liverpool are currently cruising...

arts.ttl: Revealed: The 'truth' behind Mo Salah and Trent Alexander-Arnold's training ground confrontation ahead of Liverpool's pivotal PSG clash
arts.sum: The rumour mill went into overdrive after footage emerged of the pair appearing to clash at the AXA Training Centre. Harvey Elliott and Ibrahima Konate pulled them apart.

arts.ttl: Diogo Jota leads 5 man Liverpool transfer exodus this summer as Arne Slot to 'reshape squad'
arts.sum: Arne Slot is poised to splash the cash this summer as the Dutchman closes in on the Premier League title

arts.ttl: Player ‘has a preference’ to join Liverpool, Manchester City or Arsenal – Has chosen his PL destinations
arts.sum: Sporting star Viktor Gyökeres is eyeing a move to Liverpool, Manchester City or Arsenal in the summer window. That’s according to Tuesday’s A Bola, who state the striker favours a move to the Premier League. It’s further claimed the 26-year-old ‘has a preference’ of joining Liverpool, Manchester City or Arsenal. Gyökeres’ contract lasts until 2028, The post Player ‘has a preference’ to join Liverpool, Manchester City or Arsenal – Has chosen his PL destinations appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Liverpool predicted XI v PSG: Harvey Elliott and Darwin Núñez set to start
arts.sum: Liverpool host PSG tonight at Anfield for the Champions League RO16 return leg. Arne Slot’s Reds lead the tie on aggregate courtesy of Harvey Elliott’s 87th-minute dagger last week at…

arts.ttl: ‘Messaging me’: £40m defender says his family keep asking him if he’s signing for Liverpool
arts.sum: All of the focus at Liverpool right now is on the title race, but there is a rather important summer transfer window on the horizon....

arts.ttl: Truth behind Mo Salah and Trent Alexander-Arnold incident in Liverpool training
arts.sum: Liverpool duo Mo Salah and Trent Alexander-Arnold were filmed being separated before training ahead of Tuesday's huge Champions League clash with Paris Saint-Germain

arts.ttl: The story behind Roberto Firmino PSG celebration as Liverpool seek new Champions League hero

arts.ttl: 'I'm fuming at PSG arrogance as it happened to me - I know what Liverpool will be talking about'
